title: Rhythm: shift-symbols paragraph
description: Rhythm exercise with all 10 shift symbols in context
text: alex@work.com sent: "see #task42 — it's $500 work; 80% done!" reply: "got it, 4 of 5 tasks (4/5)."

tips.text: Mix of email, hashtag, price, percentage, parens
Real-world text: "4/5 tasks" style is common

character_tips.anna: All symbols in real context — email, prices, code snippets.
character_tips.maxim: Daily writing has 5-10 special symbols per paragraph. Speed comes from familiarity.
character_tips.knopych: SYMBOL STORM! All special chars flying! 🌪️
character_tips.klavochka: Like a special code in writing — pretty and useful 💖
